```{r}
#| label: setup
library(lipsum) 
set.seed(20200818)
header <- function(words = 4, format = FALSE) {
  sprintf(
    ifelse(
      format,
      "%s '%s' `%s` _%s_",
      "%s %s %s %s"
    ),
    lipsum::sentence(words = words),
    lipsum::sentence(words = words),
    lipsum::sentence(words = words),
    lipsum::sentence(words = words)
  )
}
```

---
title: "Headings: level 1: `r header(4)`"
---

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

## Level 2: `r header(4)`

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

### Level 3: `r header(4)` {#sec-heading-3}

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

#### Level 4: `r header(5)` {#sec-heading-4}

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

##### Level 5: `r header(4)` {#sec-heading-5}

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

###### Level 6: `r header(4)` {#sec-heading-6}

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

## Headings with formatting: level 2: `r header(4, TRUE)`

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

### Level 3: `r header(4, TRUE)`

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

#### Level 4: `r header(5, TRUE)`

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

##### Level 5: `r header(4, TRUE)`

`r paragraph(n = 3)`

###### Level 6: `r header(4, TRUE)`

`r paragraph(n = 3)`
